flows.flow_name: Generate Video Briefings on First User conv_id in 2-Hour Window
actions: A new conv_id is auto-created when a user accesses the Newzbeefin agent.
The first user within a 2-hour window triggers video generation. Their conv_id becomes the source conv_id for all users during this window.
Fetch latest news by genre: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.
Access teacher avatars in the app and assign one avatar per genre.
Generate 5-minute scripts per genre and pass them along with avatar IDs for video synthesis.
Store the generated videos under the user's conv_id and mark it as: status: queued, expires_at: +2 hours.
flows.sub_goal: Generate a fresh set of AI video news briefings using teacher avatars and assign them to the first user’s conv_id.

actions: Continuously check all conv_ids with status: queued.
Once all genre videos are marked success, update the conv_id’s status to ready.
This conv_id is now the active content source for the entire 2-hour window.
flows.sub_goal: Mark the conv_id as ready once all genre videos are successfully synthesized.

flows.flow_name: Deliver Pre-Synthesized Video Briefings to All Users
actions: A new conv_id is auto-generated for each user accessing the agent.
The system fetches the current active source conv_id (marked ready) for the 2-hour cycle.
Retrieve the 5 genre-specific videos associated with that conv_id.
Deliver the same video set to all users: Each genre introduced by its dedicated teacher avatar.
Continue to serve this content until the 2-hour window expires.
flows.sub_goal: Serve the same teacher-avatar-led video briefings to all users accessing Newzbeefin during the 2-hour period.
